$comment: Admitted at M3 (T-102) by ADR-0021 per the ADR-0019 item-4 criteria. Exchange/view shape (Q1 item core); storage DDL lives in migrations/. Lifecycle enum is generated from the ratified state table (RFC-002 §3.1 / irrevon.statetable — cross-checked by tests/schemas/test_enum_sync.py, never hand-copied). $id host is a placeholder until the irrevon.dev domain purchase closes (ADR-0023). Shape changes require an ADR.
title: Effect record
description: One effect's ledger view: identity, intent members, destination binding, and the latest execution's lifecycle (dimension A). Dimension-B classification lives on findings, not here (ORPHANED is representable only as a finding — master doc §7.1). Append-only discipline: this exchange shape presents the current view; corrections are new rows.

effect_id.description: = intent_id: lowercase-hex SHA-256 over the RFC 8785-canonical identity tuple (RFC-001 §1; ADR-0020).

operation_id.description: Latest execution's operation id: intent_id ':' step; step is LEDGER-allocated, zero-based (RFC-002 §1). Idempotency evidence derives ONLY from this.

adapter_id.description: Destination binding recorded at registration (ADR-0019; destination identity per C1 finding M5).

declaration_digest.description: Capability declaration in force at registration.

parameters_digest.description: Canonical digest of the dispatchable payload (evidence; never an identity input).

lifecycle.description: Dimension A frontier of the latest execution (RFC-002 §3.1).

lifecycle_at.description: When the current lifecycle became true (transaction time of the frontier transition).

event_time.description: Optional upstream business time (ADR-0019); evidence only. Absent ≠ null.

as_of_time.$comment: Conditional bi-temporality per ADR-002: optional so later activation is additive, not a shape break.
